note: Global T2 pipeline-filler sweep 2026-06-21. NO-CODE repo: workbench is declarative content + design docs only (no package.json, no tsconfig, no lint/knip/coverage). No path-bearing CODE dimension is wired, so all are UNSCANNED (not fabricated 0). debt-markers in design docs are documentation, not code debt - not emitted. Effectively green/no-op for green-desk; markdown quality is /md-quality-review territory, not green-desk.
